name: Barbell Glute Bridge
setup: Sit on floor, barbell across hip crease (use pad if needed)
Roll bar into position, feet flat on floor
execution: Drive hips up toward ceiling, squeezing glutes at top
Body forms straight plank from shoulders to knees
common_mistakes: Hyperextending lower back at top (should be glutes, not back)
Heels too close or too far from glutes
cues: Squeeze glutes as if holding a penny between them
